charts.caller-untrusted: unauthenticated inbound requests (triggers, webhooks) before verification
charts.trigger-verified: an authenticated, well-formed trigger admitted to the enqueue path

missing_required_secrets.translates: an unregistered trigger fails closed — an unknown trigger type does not promote with its signing secret unenforced (no `.get(type, [])`)

nonTransition._load: fail-closed load of generated vocabularies — a corrupt or missing artifact fails rather than loading silently; loader correctness within persistence
nonTransition.TRIGGER_REQUIRED_SECRETS: CI path-filter covers every generated artifact — a guard-must-be-run meta-check
